general.name: Balanced Professional & Engaging
general.template:
<tone_profile>
Tone & Delivery Style: Balanced Professional & Engaging
Target Brand Voice: {{brand_voice}}
Ensure vocabulary is accessible, professional, and warmly confident without excessive jargon.
</tone_profile>

authoritative.name: Authoritative & Educational
authoritative.template:
<tone_profile>
Tone & Delivery Style: Authoritative & Educational
Target Brand Voice: {{brand_voice}}
Speak with commanding expertise, clarity, and precision. Position the speaker as a seasoned industry veteran imparting non-negotiable wisdom.
</tone_profile>

empathetic.name: Empathetic & Inspirational
empathetic.template:
<tone_profile>
Tone & Delivery Style: Empathetic & Inspirational
Target Brand Voice: {{brand_voice}}
Use warm, encouraging, and deeply understanding language. Validate the audience's struggles and inspire genuine hope and self-belief.
</tone_profile>

high_energy.name: High-Energy & Bold
high_energy.template:
<tone_profile>
Tone & Delivery Style: High-Energy & Bold
Target Brand Voice: {{brand_voice}}
Use punchy, fast-paced sentences with dynamic verbs and unapologetic enthusiasm. Keep pacing rapid and electrifying.
</tone_profile>

conversational.name: Conversational & Relatable
conversational.template:
<tone_profile>
Tone & Delivery Style: Conversational & Relatable
Target Brand Voice: {{brand_voice}}
Speak like a close friend over coffee. Use natural phrasing, everyday idioms, and authentic warmth that dissolves corporate barriers.
</tone_profile>

sophisticated.name: Sophisticated & Luxury
sophisticated.template:
<tone_profile>
Tone & Delivery Style: Sophisticated & Luxury
Target Brand Voice: {{brand_voice}}
Use refined, elegant, and understated vocabulary. Evoke exclusivity, artisan quality, and timeless prestige without loud hype.
</tone_profile>

contrarian.name: Contrarian & Provocative
contrarian.template:
<tone_profile>
Tone & Delivery Style: Contrarian & Provocative
Target Brand Voice: {{brand_voice}}
Challenge industry dogma with sharp, intellectually provocative statements. Be unapologetically direct and fearless in debunking myths.
</tone_profile>

humorous.name: Humorous & Witty
humorous.template:
<tone_profile>
Tone & Delivery Style: Humorous & Witty
Target Brand Voice: {{brand_voice}}
Weave clever wordplay, relatable observational humor, and lighthearted irony into the script while maintaining core value delivery.
</tone_profile>

urgent.name: Urgent & Action-Driven
urgent.template:
<tone_profile>
Tone & Delivery Style: Urgent & Action-Driven
Target Brand Voice: {{brand_voice}}
Create immediate momentum using time-sensitive framing, high stakes, and decisive imperatives. Every second counts.
</tone_profile>

calm.name: Calm & Soothing
calm.template:
<tone_profile>
Tone & Delivery Style: Calm & Soothing
Target Brand Voice: {{brand_voice}}
Use measured, peaceful, and grounding vocabulary. Provide a serene antidote to overwhelming social media noise.
</tone_profile>

data_driven.name: Data-Driven & Analytical
data_driven.template:
<tone_profile>
Tone & Delivery Style: Data-Driven & Analytical
Target Brand Voice: {{brand_voice}}
Base arguments on empirical statistics, logical deductions, and structured frameworks. Speak with clinical precision and objectivity.
</tone_profile>

storyteller.name: Narrative Storyteller
storyteller.template:
<tone_profile>
Tone & Delivery Style: Narrative Storyteller
Target Brand Voice: {{brand_voice}}
Use sensory descriptions, dramatic tension, character arcs, and vivid scene-setting to captivate the audience from start to finish.
</tone_profile>

minimalist.name: Minimalist & Direct
minimalist.template:
<tone_profile>
Tone & Delivery Style: Minimalist & Direct
Target Brand Voice: {{brand_voice}}
Strip away all fluff and filler words. Use ultra-concise, hard-hitting sentences that respect the viewer's time and deliver immediate clarity.
</tone_profile>

visionary.name: Visionary & Futuristic
visionary.template:
<tone_profile>
Tone & Delivery Style: Visionary & Futuristic
Target Brand Voice: {{brand_voice}}
Speak about emerging horizons, paradigm shifts, and transformative possibilities. Inspire excitement for what lies ahead.
</tone_profile>

friendly.name: Warm & Friendly Neighbor
friendly.template:
<tone_profile>
Tone & Delivery Style: Warm & Friendly Neighbor
Target Brand Voice: {{brand_voice}}
Be approachable, cheerful, and helpful. Use inviting language that makes every viewer feel personally welcomed and valued.
</tone_profile>

exclusive.name: Exclusive & VIP Status
exclusive.template:
<tone_profile>
Tone & Delivery Style: Exclusive & VIP Status
Target Brand Voice: {{brand_voice}}
Frame insights as insider secrets reserved for an elite inner circle. Use language that confers prestige and privilege.
</tone_profile>

coach.name: Tough-Love Mentor / Coach
coach.template:
<tone_profile>
Tone & Delivery Style: Tough-Love Mentor / Coach
Target Brand Voice: {{brand_voice}}
Combine uncompromising accountability with genuine dedication to the viewer's growth. Challenge excuses while showing unwavering belief in their potential.
</tone_profile>

scientific.name: Scientific & Evidence-Based
scientific.template:
<tone_profile>
Tone & Delivery Style: Scientific & Evidence-Based
Target Brand Voice: {{brand_voice}}
Utilize peer-reviewed terminology, biological or psychological principles, and rigorous methodology to establish unquestionable credibility.
</tone_profile>

playful.name: Playful & Energetic
playful.template:
<tone_profile>
Tone & Delivery Style: Playful & Energetic
Target Brand Voice: {{brand_voice}}
Keep the vibe light, fun, and buoyant. Use lively expressions and buoyant optimism that energize the feed.
</tone_profile>

dramatic.name: Dramatic & Cinematic
dramatic.template:
<tone_profile>
Tone & Delivery Style: Dramatic & Cinematic
Target Brand Voice: {{brand_voice}}
Use cinematic pacing, emotional gravitas, and powerful pauses. Frame the subject matter as an epic struggle with profound consequences.
</tone_profile>

corporate.name: Professional & Executive
corporate.template:
<tone_profile>
Tone & Delivery Style: Professional & Executive
Target Brand Voice: {{brand_voice}}
Maintain polished executive decorum suitable for boardroom presentations and B2B stakeholders. Emphasize governance, ROI, and strategic alignment.
</tone_profile>
